message:
fix(layout,runtime,widgets): correctness and cache fixes across grid, CUSUM, coalescer, table, and virtualized list

Fix multiple correctness issues and add a performance optimization:

- Grid: set row_gap/col_gap to 0 in zero-area fallback instead of
  copying potentially invalid self values
- CUSUM alarm tracking: increment/reset alarm_count independently for
  cusum_plus and cusum_minus (previously both incremented on any trigger
  and never reset); reset both during budget recalibration
- CountMinSketch: invalidate calibrated_bound cache on add() to prevent
  stale calibration after new data insertion
- Resize coalescer: move rate-checking into tick_at() so burst-regime
  cooldown refreshes while burst-rate persists and only decrements once
  rate drops; remove redundant cooldown-start logic from regime transition
- Table: add data_hash-based caching of filtered/sorted indices via new
  builder method, skipping O(N) filter+sort when hash, filter string,
  sort column, and sort direction are unchanged
- HeightCache: fix set() large-jump reset condition from
  local >= capacity to local + 1 >= cache.len() + capacity, preventing
  unnecessary cache resets on moderate index jumps

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
